metadata.dc:title: NeuroKit2: The Python Toolbox for Neurophysiological Signal Processing
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
metadata.dc:description: NeuroKit2 is an open-source Python toolbox designed for the comprehensive processing and analysis of neurophysiological signals (ECG, EEG, EDA, EMG, PPG). This distribution is part of a reproducibility initiative.
metadata.dc:subject: neurophysiology, signal-processing, ECG, EEG, EDA, PPG, EMG, Python, open-science, reproducibility

datacite:contributor.datacite:contributorName: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
